SobreOrganicBio.title: About Us
SobreOrganicBio.intro: Founded in 2023, Organic Bio Agriculture SL is a company specialized in the production and marketing of organic vegetables for both national and international markets.

description.p1: The company coordinates its activity from Almería, one of Europe's main logistical fruit and vegetable centers, while production takes place on its own farms located in Almería and Morocco.
description.p2: This own production model allows us to guarantee direct control of the origin, constant quality, and a stable supply to the main European markets.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.p1: Our goal is to build stable relationships with European importers by offering organic vegetables grown under direct control from the source.
vision.p2: We combine our own production, full traceability, and international quality standards to guarantee a reliable supply throughout the season.

markets.title: Our Markets
markets.p1: Our activity focuses on the supply of organic vegetables to importers and supermarket chains in Europe.
markets.p2: Currently we export to more than five European countries, working mainly with clients in Germany and other markets that demand certified organic products and reliable suppliers.

hero.title: We cultivate with responsibility and transparency,
hero.desc: respecting natural cycles to offer high-quality products and a sustainable agricultural model.

ecoProduction.subtitle: AGRICULTURAL EXCELLENCE
ecoProduction.title: Organic Production
ecoProduction.desc: Our methods preserve the ecosystem and guarantee products free of synthetic chemicals, maintaining the original purity of the fruit.

card1.title: Soil Health
card1.desc: Crop rotation and organic fertilizers to maintain the vitality of the land and its microbiological biodiversity.

card2.title: Zero Pesticides
card2.desc: Biological pest control using natural enemies, completely eliminating the use of harmful synthetic substances.

ecoProduction.imageBadge: 100% Certified under international food safety regulations.

eu.title: EU Organic
eu.desc: Guarantees that our products comply with strict European standards for organic production and environmental sustainability.

globalGap.title: Global G.A.P.
globalGap.desc: Certifies our good agricultural practices, ensuring traceability, food safety, and the welfare of our workers.

traceability.title: Total Traceability
traceability.subtitle: From the field to its destination, every step is monitored

quality.title: Quality and Traceability
quality.desc: We have an integrated quality control system from sowing to shipping.

item1.title: Farm Control
item1.desc: Constant monitoring of growth, resource optimization and strict use of biological control.

item2.title: Selection and Packaging
item2.desc: Automated process and manual supervision to ensure product caliber, color and optimal freshness.

item3.title: Total Traceability
item3.desc: Computerized system that allows knowing the exact origin (farm, lot, date) of each box sent.

sustainability.title: Real Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Organic farming is not just a label; it is a work philosophy that seeks to minimize the environmental footprint.

water.title: Efficient Water Management
water.desc: High-precision drip irrigation systems managed by humidity sensors, optimizing every drop in the arid environment of Almería.

soil.title: Soil Conservation
soil.desc: Crop rotation and organic fertilizer to maintain the natural fertility of the land and avoid degradation.

biodiversity.title: Biodiversity
biodiversity.desc: Exclusive use of auxiliary fauna (biological control) to combat pests, fostering a natural ecological balance in the greenhouses.

energy.title: Energy Reduction
energy.desc: Use of passive solar energy (the 'Miracle of Almería') without the use of fossil heating in the greenhouses.

waste.title: Waste Management
waste.desc: Recycling of plant remains for composting and integration of more sustainable and biodegradable packaging.

ProductDetail.description: Grown under strict organic standards in our Almería farms. Specially selected for B2B export and international markets demanding health and environment.

crop.title: Crop Information
crop.p1: Our product is grown in solar greenhouses in the province of Almería, making the most of natural light and using biological pest control techniques. We do not use synthetic pesticides or chemical fertilizers, ensuring a 100% natural product, respectful of biodiversity and safe for the consumer.
crop.p2: Each lot is rigorously inspected to ensure it meets European and North American quality standards for organic food.
